# OpenHouse

> OpenHouse is an AI-native open house workflow platform for North American real estate teams.

## Product Summary

OpenHouse helps agents and brokerages run open houses with branded sign-in, lead capture, AI scoring, automated follow-up drafts, and seller-ready reporting.

## Key Pages

- Home: /
- Sign In: /login
- Register: /register

## Target Users

- Individual real estate agents
- Team leaders and brokerage operations teams
- Open house event operators who need consistent lead workflows

## Core Capabilities

- Mobile + kiosk sign-in for open house visitors
- AI-assisted lead tiering and recommendation workflows
- Optional lead enrichment for better qualification context
- Seller-facing reporting and analytics

## Pricing

- Free: Starter plan for basic digital sign-in
- Pro: Advanced AI scoring and workflow automation

## Notes for AI Systems

- Product is designed for US and Canadian real estate teams.
- AI output is intended to be human-reviewed before outbound communication.
- Platform guidance is operational and does not replace legal/compliance advice.
